name: iiit-nagpur-npl-bidding-system
description: Prototype player auction platform for IIIT Nagpur Premier League.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run serve --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:vite: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
